creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
On Wed, Feb 23, 2011 at 1:55 PM, Scot Hetzel <swhetzel@gmail.com> wrote:
> I am experiencing the same problem with a recent -CURRENT:
>
> FreeBSD vbox.hetzel.local 9.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT #0 r218879M:
> Sun Feb 20 08:46:49 UTC 2011
> root@vbox.hetzel.local:/usr/obj/usr/src/9x/sys/GENERIC amd64
>
One thing I forgot to mention, this is just a recent -CURRENT with no
gcc or binutils ports installed.

This problem is now being caused by the recent binutils 2.17.50 import
into -CURRENT.

Scot
